nasb.text: that you may enter into the covenant with the Lord your God, and into His oath which the Lord your God is making with you today,

esv.text: so that you may enter into the sworn covenant of the Lord your God, which the Lord your God is making with you today,

cnv.text: 為要叫你遵守耶和華你的　神今日與你所立的約，和他向你所起的誓；

ccb.text: 为要接受你们的上帝耶和华与你们立的誓约。
